creator: michael@stroeder.com
text:
Disclaimer:
Being the author of web2ldap I want to give some hints, but I know next-to-nothing about FreeBSD.

Please note that web2ldap installation has been changed to PIP-based installation method:
https://www.web2ldap.de/install.html
I hope this makes things more easy. Is there a FreeBSD packaging wrapper for setuptools/PIP?

You might also need new native packages for some Python modules, AFAICS at least:
https://pypi.org/project/ldap0/
ldap0 is a fork of python-ldap, so this should be fairly straight forward.

Feel free to contact me if you have any questions.
